name: color
description: Palette name (`'primary' | 'success' | 'danger' | 'warning' | 'dark' | 'light' | social`) or hex / `rgb(...)` / `r,g,b`. Exposes `--c` for descendants (Buttons, Avatars).

name: active
description: Reserved for future visual states. Has no effect today.

name: wide
description: Wider max-width (`480px` instead of the default `350px`).

name: imgInset
description: Render the image with insets / padding around it instead of edge-to-edge. Gives the image its own rounded frame and a soft margin from the card edges — the visual idiom the `compact` variant is built on.

name: imgSize
description: Override the image cell's main dimension. Variant-dependent: `compact` uses it as the square edge, `horizontal` as the left column width, vertical variants (`default`, `caption`, `frosted`, `peek`) as the image area's max-height. Number is treated as `px`; any CSS length is accepted as a string.

name: body
description: Body slot — rendered inside `.card__text` below the title.

name: buttons
description: Button strip — rendered inside `.card__buttons` (in normal flow, below the body).

name: actions
description: Floating action strip — rendered inside `.card__actions`, absolutely centered, pinned to the card's bottom edge and translated by `50%` of its own height so the row hangs exactly half outside the card regardless of the action content's actual height. Use for hero / compact-style cards.

name: interactions
description: Floating overlay over the image — rendered inside `.card__interactions`.

name: children
description: Free-form children. Appended after the named snippets when any are set; replaces them when none are.
